{{nihongo|'''Mitsuno Shrine'''|御津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Mitsuno Shrine (Q135039577) | native_name = 御津神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Mitsuno Shrine (Q135039577) | coordinates = {{coord|34.822528|137.311248}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Mitsuno Shrine'''|御津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Mitsuno Shrine (Q135039577) | native_name = 御津神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Mitsuno Shrine (Q135039577) | coordinates = {{coord|34.822528|137.311248}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Mitsuno Shrine'''|御津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Mitsuno Shrine'''|御津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mitsuno Shrine'''|御津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Mitsuno Shrine (Q135039577) | native_name = 御津神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Mitsuno Shrine (Q135039577) | coordinates = {{coord|34.822528|137.311248}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Mitsuno Shrine'''|御津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Mitsuno Shrine (Q135039577) | native_name = 御津神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Mitsuno Shrine (Q135039577) | coordinates = {{coord|34.822528|137.311248}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Mitsuno Shrine'''|御津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==
